title: Phase 1B sub-agent skill integration opened (sentry pilot)
body: Penumbral Hiding Veil opening Phase 1B of sub-agent rename + skill integration plan. Claim 51d6d5e6 registered for the 8 paired domains under .agent/sub-agents/templates/, .agent/skills/, .claude/skills/, .agents/skills/, plus .claude/settings.json. No overlap with foreign-staged content (napkin/repo-continuity/threads from Riverine/Velvet/Woodland) — those remain untouched. Pilot starts with sentry-expert (256 LoC template + 146 LoC skill); pause-and-assess after pilot before continuing.
